upload_pipeline.action: Generate presigned PUT URL and return object_key
Client PUT to MinIO using presigned URL
upload_pipeline.on_success: Client notifies backend (callback) or backend verifies object
upload_pipeline.on_failure: Client retries; presigned URL may expire

upload_pipeline.action: Insert metadata row in Postgres with index_status='pending'
upload_pipeline.on_failure: Delete MinIO object (compensating action) and return error

upload_pipeline.action: Enqueue Celery task: fetch image from MinIO, run CLIP, index vector into Milvus
upload_pipeline.on_failure: Mark Postgres images.index_status='failed'; schedule retry according to retry_policy

upload_pipeline.action: On successful indexing, update Postgres images.index_status='ready'
upload_pipeline.on_failure: If repeated failures, escalate and keep index_status='failed' for manual intervention

idempotency.behavior_on_duplicate: Return same job_id/result or 409 if conflict; do not re-enqueue duplicate tasks

postgresql.migration_notes: Use alembic for schema migrations; include migration scripts for creating extensions and indexes.

columns.created_at: TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

columns.user_id: INTEGER REFERENCES users(id) ON DELETE CASCADE
columns.title: VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL
columns.created_at: TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
columns.updated_at: TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

indexes: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_images_user_id ON images (user_id)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_images_privacy_level ON images (privacy_level)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_images_created_at ON images (created_at)
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_images_tags_gin ON images USING gin (tags)

milvus.notes: Ensure Milvus collection schema matches vector_dim; backup snapshots regularly.

backup_and_dr.restore_playbook: Documented steps for restoring Postgres, Milvus snapshot, and MinIO objects; test DR quarterly.

security_and_secrets.secret_management: Use Vault or cloud secret manager; reference via env vars

network.recommended: Private VPC for DB/Milvus/MinIO; restrict inbound to backend and workers

testing_and_ci.contract_tests: OpenAPI validation in CI; run openapi-generator to validate stubs

reindex_strategy.approach: batch reindex with resume token; use job queue and monitor progress
reindex_strategy.safety: mark old index read-only until new index validated

incident_response.on_index_failure: Mark images.index_status='failed'; enqueue retry job; alert on repeated failures
incident_response.on_minio_unreachable: Retry with exponential backoff; fail uploads gracefully and notify user

notes.vector_dim_mismatch_handling: Clients should call GET /health/readiness to read X-Expected-Vector-Dim header. Server returns HTTP 400 with structured Error {code: 'ERR_VECTOR_DIM_MISMATCH'} when vector length mismatches.
notes.filter_expression_guidance: Use structured FilterExpression JSON (and/or/leaf). Use op 'contains' for tags (JSONB array membership) and 'in' for enums/numeric lists. Backend must validate and sanitize before passing to Milvus or SQL.
